abort.cannot_get_gateway_serial: Could not retrieve gateway serial from the RX11. Please try again.
abort.device_added: The device **{device_name}** is now available and entities have been created.
abort.device_not_connected:
The RX11 USB Transceiver is not connected.

To add a new device, the RX11 must be reachable.
Please check the USB connection.
abort.frequency_not_permitted: This device operates on {frequency}, which is not permitted in your configured Home Assistant region ({country}).
abort.no_devices_found: No serial ports found. Make sure the RX11 USB Transceiver is plugged in and recognized by the system.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the RX11 USB Transceiver. Make sure it is plugged in and no other application is using the port.
error.cannot_get_gateway_serial: Could not retrieve gateway serial from the RX11. Please try again.
error.device_no_longer_available: The selected device is no longer available. Please try again.

progress.waiting_for_sensor: 🔄 Waiting for learn signal... Press the learn button on the Easywave neo sensor NOW!
progress.waiting_for_transmitter: 🔄 Waiting for transmitter signal... Press a button on the Easywave transmitter NOW!

menu_option_descriptions.buttons_4: The transmitter/channel has 4 buttons with button codes A, B, C and D.

No radio signal received!
Reduce the distance between sensor and server and try again.

learn_timeout_transmitter.description:
No radio signal received!
Reduce the distance between transmitter and server and try again.

Home Assistant automatically detects which measurement data the sensor provides.

Please press the learn button on the back of the sensor in the next step.

transmitter_learn_intro.description: Please specify the number of buttons in the next step, then press a button on the Easywave transmitter.

frequency_not_permitted.description:
This Easywave hardware operates on **{frequency}**, which is **not permitted** in your configured Home Assistant region (**{country}**).

The integration has been disabled for regulatory compliance.

If you believe this is incorrect, verify your country setting under **Settings → System → General → Country**. The 868 MHz band is permitted in EU/EEA countries, the UK, Switzerland, Norway, and Liechtenstein.
frequency_not_permitted.title: Easywave: {frequency} not permitted in {country}

button_press_a.name: Button A pressed
